{{Quote|And folks come from lightyears away just to sink their teeth, fangs, or whatever into the best banthaburger this side of the Cheenee Rift!|Gep's Grill advertisement in a [[Tatooine Visitors Bureau]] brochure|<ref name="Star Wars Technical Journal">''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]''</ref>}}
'''Gep's Grill''' was a location at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was a stall at the market place where grilled [[Dewback/Legends|Dewback]] and [[Bantha/Legends|Bantha]] meat was offered at fair prices. It was owned by two [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphids]]: [[Fillin Ta]] and [[Norun Gep]]. The menu was simple, but adequate for the people who visited the place.

Gep's Grill was the main business partner of [[Spaceport Express/Legends|Spaceport Express]].<ref name="GG7" />

===Menu circa [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]===
*[[Bantha Burger]]—1.5[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|c]]
*Bantha Platter (comes with all the fixin's and [[salamander stick]]s)—2.0c
*[[Dewback ribs]] (6 pack)—2.5c
*Ribs (10 pack)—4.0c<ref name="GG7" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Geps_Grill_ad.jpg|250px|thumb|An advertisement for Gep's Grill]]
In ''When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale'', Gep's Grill is misspelled "Gap's Grill".
